category_sources: source_facts.description says Reddit is refined for the terminal; official GitHub repository describes Reddix as a terminal Reddit client.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title uses Reddix; source_facts.name is reddix.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface for installation and usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/ck-zhang/reddix; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions Reddit in the terminal; GitHub repository topics and README indicate terminal Reddit client functionality.
